homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 5 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

0:
How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.

1 - completely incorrect
2 - mostly incorrect
3 - somewhat correct
4 - mostly correct
5 - completely correct
1:
How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

1 - incomplete
2 - mostly incomplete
3 - somewhat complete
4 - mostly complete
5 - complete

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features a minimalist instrumental track with a steady rhythm and a repetitive melody played on a glockenspiel. The soft, mallet-driven sound creates a calm and innocent atmosphere that is well-suited for a lullaby or a peaceful scene in animation.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: Freedom Assault delivers an aggressive hardcore punk track titled "Welcome to 1984" featuring heavy guitar riffs and rapid drumming. A raspy male voice sings in a high pitch over the chaotic instrumentation, creating a violent and intense atmosphere typical of the genre's crust substyle. The song's raw energy makes it fitting for a horror movie soundtrack or similar dark media contexts.

questions.name: Sample 6
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This segment features a driving instrumental track powered by pulsating synthesizers and a strong computer-generated beat. While the sound blends elements of electronic music with dark intensity, it maintains an energetic rhythm suited for a nightclub atmosphere. The overall vibe is atmospheric and deep, relying heavily on synthesized basslines to create a unique sonic texture.

questions.name: Sample 10
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental track blends electronic dance music elements with a repetitive synthesizer melody and groovy electric bassline. Upbeat electronic drums drive the rhythm, creating a lively atmosphere that feels well-suited for a club setting despite the song's association with the *Project DIVA* series.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
